'''''Star Wars Chronicles: The Prequels''''' is a 343-page reference book including over 3,000 color photographs, behind-the-scenes production stills, early sketches, computer renderings, outtakes, and many other things from the archives that show every detail of the [[prequel trilogy]]. The book follows in the tradition of its predecessor, [[Star Wars Chronicles|''Star Wars: Chronicles'']], in content and length.

It was written by [[Stephen J. Sansweet]] and [[Pablo Hidalgo]]. Sansweet takes advantage of his unique position as Director of Content Management and Head of Fan Relations at [[Lucasfilm]] to offer an in-depth tome for the prequels.

The book features a black, die-cut slipcase outlining [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader's]] helmet which encloses the face of a young Anakin Skywalker on the book's silver, inside cover.

==Publisher's summary==
''Packed with breathtaking art and imagery culled from Lucasfilm's massive archives, ''Star Wars Chronicles: The Prequels'' explains and deconstructs every vehicle, character, location, and weapon in the films, virtually frame-by-frame. With its companion volume, ''Star Wars Chronicles'', this detailed and extraordinary book is a virtual tour de force of the ''Star Wars'' universe. More than 3,000 full-color photos, behind-the-scenes production stills, early sketches, computer renderings, deleted scenes, comparative size charts, and revealing text feature ''The Phantom Menace'', ''Attack of the Clones'', ''Revenge of the Sith'', and ''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' animated series.''

==Contents==
*Introduction
**The Saga renewed (p. 9)
**Comparison charts (p. 12)
**''Star Wars'' Saga timeline (p. 20)
*Chapter 1 - Episode I: The Phantom Menace (p. 22)
*Chapter 2 - Episode II: Attack of the Clones (p. 128)
*Chapter 3 - The animated Star Wars: Clone Wars (p. 234)
*Chapter 4 - Episode III: Revenge of the Sith (p. 236)
*Chapter 5
**The [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]]: ''Star Wars'' [[:Category:Novels|novels]] and [[:Category:Comics|comics]] (p. 332)
**Index (p. 335)
